name: Web - XSS Attack Attempt
description: Detects Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attempts in web requests with optimized search performance and enhanced evasion detection. Covers reflected XSS via URI/query parameters including script tags, event handlers, javascript: URIs, and common encoding bypass techniques.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) ("<script" OR "javascript:" OR "on*=" OR "%3c" OR "eval(" OR "fromCharCode") | eval full_request=lower(uri)."|".coalesce(lower(uri_query), "") | eval xss_match=case( match(full_request, "<script"), "Script tag", match(full_request, "(?i)javascript:"), "JS URI", match(full_request, "(?i)on\w+\s*=\s*['\"]?[^'\"]+['\"]?"), "Event handler", match(full_request, "(?i)<(iframe|object|embed|svg|img|body|link|meta|style)[^>]*(src|href|xlink:href|action|onerror|onload)"), "Tag injection", match(full_request, "(%3c|%253c|%3e|%253e|\\x3c|\\x3e)"), "Encoded XSS tag", match(full_request, "(?i)(eval|setTimeout|setInterval|Function)\s*\("), "JS execution", match(full_request, "(?i)String\.fromCharCode"), "JS encoding bypass", match(full_request, "(?i)expression\s*\("), "CSS expression", 1==0, null()) | where isnotnull(xss_match) | stats count as hit_count, values(xss_match) as xss_types, values(uri) as uris, values(status) as status_codes, dc(uri) as unique_endpoints by src_ip, host | eval severity="high" | eval mitre="T1059.007" | sort -hit_count | table src_ip, host, hit_count, unique_endpoints, xss_types, status_codes, uris, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
